statement: Replace better-sqlite3 with Node's built-in node:sqlite (v1.0.0)
rationale: better-sqlite3 was Hunch's only remaining native SQLite dependency: prebuild-install (its installer) is deprecated upstream with no fix coming, node-gyp fallback builds fail on machines without toolchains, and Windows global upgrades hit EPERM when a running node process holds better_sqlite3.node locked. The derived index uses only FTS5, WAL, recursive CTEs, and plain BLOBs — all covered by node:sqlite (unflagged since Node 22.13, verified live). Vectors were already brute-force JS, no loadable extension needed.
reversal_conditions: Source decision dec_b3cafd3855 is superseded or the structural interpretation is rejected.
limitations: Inferred from one exact first-parent Git structural delta; replay coverage is established only by a later plan-bound proof.
Scope is intentionally limited to the changed file and anchored to one stable symbol in that file.
TypeScript/JavaScript static ESM import/export specifiers only; require(), dynamic import(), package aliases, and runtime loading are not covered.

audit.reason: Compiled from one unambiguous assertion enumerated by evidence ev_dc06b6fdf3.
